author: PlayStation
text:
LEGO Batman: Legacy of the Dark Knight - Deluxe Edition Trailer | PS5 Games
https://store.playstation.com/product/UP1018-PPSA16833_00-LEGOBATMANDLXEDT

Alfred, it’s time to open the Deluxe wing of the Batcave. 

Pre-order the Deluxe Edition of #LEGOBatmanGame and play early on May 19!  

LEGO Batman: Legacy of the Dark Knight is a brand-new open world action adventure video game that invites players to embark on Bruce Wayne’s epic journey to become the hero of Gotham City, inspired by decades of Batman films, television, comic books, and games, and jam-packed with Batman nostalgia, DC lore, and TT Games’ signature brand of fun-filled LEGO humor.   

#ps5 #ps5games #LegacyoftheDarkKnight #LEGOBatman #DC #Batman

author: PlayStation
text:
Nitro Gen Omega - Launch Trailer | PS5 Games
https://store.playstation.com/product/EP7776-PPSA35444_00-NITROGENOMEGA000

A sandbox tactical RPG of steel, fire, friendship, and shonen anime. Assemble your crew, customize your Mech, and lead them in cinematic turn-based battles through a world ruled by rogue AI. The bonds you forge will decide who survives! Out now on PlayStation 5!

#ps5 #ps5games

Firefighting Simulator: Ignite - Kenworth Fire Truck Pack Launch Trailer | PS5 Games

Join the Oakridge City Fire Department and enjoy new vehicles in your fleet with the Kenworth® Fire Truck Pack. It adds three new, authentically recreated vehicles from Kenworth® Trucks that will enrich your vehicle fleet in Firefighting Simulator: Ignite. 

#ps5 #ps5games #

author: PlayStation
text:
Directive 8020 - Launch Trailer | PS5 Games
https://www.playstation.com/en-us/games/directive-8020/

From the creators of Until Dawn and The Quarry, an all-new sci-fi survival horror adventure awaits on PlayStation 5 – Directive 8020 is out now!

Earth is dying and humanity is running out of time. 12 light years from home, Tau Ceti f offers a final chance at survival. When the colony ship Cassiopeia crash lands, its crew quickly realise they are not alone.
Encounter an alien lifeform that perfectly imitates its prey. Years of training and trust are lost among the crew when their enemy hides in plain sight.

Upgrade your mission with the Deluxe Edition which unlocks: The Dark Pictures Outfit Pack, Additional Dark Pictures Collectibles, Cinematic Filter Packs, Digital Artbook and exclusive soundtrack. 

In space, death takes many forms. Play now on PlayStation 5 and PlayStation 5 Pro!

When every decision matters, heightened tension comes to life through ray tracing, PSSR, and more on PlayStation 5 Pro.

#ps5 #ps5games #directive8020 

Rated Mature

author: PlayStation
text:
Phasmophobia x Alan Wake 2 - Launch Trailer | PS5 & PS VR2 Games
https://www.playstation.com/en-us/games/phasmophobia/

Kinetic Games has launched the limited-time event 'Phasmophobia by Alan Wake', an in-game collaboration that brings the atmosphere of Alan Wake 2 to Phasmophobia. Out now on PS5 and PS VR2 between May 12th and June 2nd.

#ps5 #ps5games #psvr2 #psvr2games #phasmophobia #alanwake2
